name: healpy (HEALPix Spherical Pixelization for Python)
pricing_notes: Open source (GPL-2.0); ESA / Gorski et al.

performance.notes: C++ HEALPix backend; spherical harmonics transforms are fast

agent_readiness.notes: HEALPix spherical pixelization for CMB and full-sky maps. import healpy as hp. nside = 512. npix = hp.nside2npix(nside). m = np.zeros(npix). theta, phi = hp.pix2ang(nside, ipix). ipix = hp.ang2pix(nside, theta, phi). hp.read_map('planck_map.fits'). hp.write_map('output.fits', m). hp.mollview(m, title='CMB'). hp.anafast(m): spherical harmonic transform → Cl power spectrum. hp.synfast(Cl, nside): simulate from power spectrum. Planck CMB data. CMB lensing. Galactic foregrounds.

gotchas: GPL-2.0 license — copyleft for commercial use
Highly domain-specific — CMB, full-sky maps, astrophysics only
HEALPix coordinate conventions (RING vs NESTED ordering) can be confusing
Visualization requires display for Mollweide/orthographic projections
No type annotations — poor IDE support
best_when: CMB (Cosmic Microwave Background) analysis with Planck data
Angular power spectrum computation (Cl from spherical harmonic transform)
summary: healpy provides HEALPix spherical pixelization for CMB and full-sky astrophysics. hp.read_map('planck.fits'). hp.mollview(m). hp.anafast(m) → power spectrum Cl. hp.synfast(Cl, nside). pix2ang/ang2pix coordinate conversion. GPL-2.0 by ESA. Essential for Planck CMB data analysis and full-sky spherical maps. Highly domain-specific. RING vs NESTED ordering distinction important.
